THEUNDERSTUDY-FALSE_MASK.title: False Mask
THEUNDERSTUDY-FALSE_MASK.description:
Start each combat [gold]Weak[/gold].
Select the first card of your initial hand.
THEUNDERSTUDY-FALSE_MASK.selectionPrompt: Select a card to add to your hand.
THEUNDERSTUDY-FALSE_MASK.flavor: The cost of knowing exactly what you need.
THEUNDERSTUDY-TRUE_MASK.title: True Mask
THEUNDERSTUDY-TRUE_MASK.description:
Start each combat with 2 [gold]Unweak[/gold].
Select the first 2 cards of your initial hand.
THEUNDERSTUDY-TRUE_MASK.selectionPrompt: Select 2 cards to add to your hand.
THEUNDERSTUDY-TRUE_MASK.flavor: What once weighed you down now lifts you up.
THEUNDERSTUDY-CUE_LIGHT.title: Cue Light
THEUNDERSTUDY-CUE_LIGHT.description: Every 5 cards that become [gold]Unplayable[/gold], apply 2 [gold]Weak[/gold] to a random enemy.
THEUNDERSTUDY-CUE_LIGHT.flavor: Every missed entrance is the enemy's cue to falter.
THEUNDERSTUDY-FOLDABLE_STAGE.title: Foldable Stage
THEUNDERSTUDY-FOLDABLE_STAGE.description: You may Enchant a card with [gold]Tuned[/gold] at Rest Sites.
THEUNDERSTUDY-FOLDABLE_STAGE.flavor: Rehearse anywhere; the boards travel with you.
THEUNDERSTUDY-GREASEPAINT.title: Greasepaint
THEUNDERSTUDY-GREASEPAINT.description: Every 5 debuffs applied to you, apply 2 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to a random enemy.
THEUNDERSTUDY-GREASEPAINT.flavor: Wear the wound as a mask; let them see it and flinch.
THEUNDERSTUDY-LOZENGE.title: Lozenge
THEUNDERSTUDY-LOZENGE.description: At the start of your turn, gain 2 [gold]Vigor[/gold].
THEUNDERSTUDY-LOZENGE.flavor: For the voice that must go on.
THEUNDERSTUDY-ROSIN.title: Rosin
THEUNDERSTUDY-ROSIN.description: Whenever you apply [gold]Tuned[/gold] to a card with no [gold]Tuned[/gold], apply an additional [gold]Tuned[/gold].
THEUNDERSTUDY-ROSIN.flavor: A little draws every string tighter.
THEUNDERSTUDY-SAFETY_NET.title: Safety Net
THEUNDERSTUDY-SAFETY_NET.flavor: No fall is too far when someone's rigged the catch.
THEUNDERSTUDY-SCORE.title: Score
THEUNDERSTUDY-SCORE.description: You may Enchant a card with [gold]Planned[/gold] at Rest Sites.
THEUNDERSTUDY-SCORE.flavor: Every entrance and exit, written down in advance.
